results.evidence: init.ts line 104: `if (!projectName) projectName = '.'` normalizes undefined to CWD. TC-006 verifies initCommand(undefined) resolves to process.cwd().
init.ts line 116: home directory guard fires after normalization. TC-009 confirms process.exit(1) when CWD = os.homedir().
init.ts line 125: PROJECT_NAME_PATTERN test triggers input prompt for non-matching CWD names. TC-010 confirms prompt with suggested slug for 'My Project'.
init.ts lines 154-180: explicit project name creates subdirectory via mkdirSync. TC-008 and TC-011 confirm.

init.ts lines 103-104: single normalization `if (!projectName) projectName = '.'` with comment `// No args = init in CWD, same as explicit '.'`. The subsequent `if (projectName === '.')` is one unified branch.
path-utils.ts lines 301-324: `buildUmbrellaConfig(discovery, projectName)` exists with correct signature and return type. TC-001 through TC-003 plus three-way collision test verify behavior.

init.ts line 363 (initial scan) and line 409 (post-clone re-scan) both call buildUmbrellaConfig. Zero inline prefix deduplication logic remains (grep for usedPrefixes/substring returns no matches in init.ts).

path-utils.ts line 310: 3-char uppercase prefix via `r.name.substring(0, 3).toUpperCase()`. Lines 311-314: collision dedup with 2-char + incrementing numeric suffix. TC-002 and three-way collision test verify.
index.ts line 31: `buildUmbrellaConfig` exported from barrel file alongside other path-utils exports.
Descoped in spec.md - guard clause error messages already show umbrella root and suspicious segment.
Descoped in spec.md - current !hasGit && !hasRepos condition matches approved plan.
repo-connect.ts line 133: `default: 'existing'` in promptProjectSetup select choices. Test mock in init-path-resolution.test.ts line 249 confirms default 'existing' behavior.

findings.title: Prefix deduplication produces short prefixes for 1-2 character repo names
findings.description: When a repo name is 1 character (e.g., 'a'), `substring(0, 3)` returns 'A' and dedup uses `substring(0, 2)` which returns just 'A'. For 2-char names like 'ab', the prefix is 'AB' and dedup uses 'AB'. These are valid but may produce confusing prefixes. This is pre-existing behavior that was moved into the helper, not introduced by this increment.
findings.suggestedFix: No fix needed for this increment since it preserves existing behavior. Could add a guard to pad short names in a follow-up.
findings.impact: Cosmetic only. Extremely unlikely in practice since repo names are virtually never 1-2 characters.

findings.title: FR-003 not marked as descoped despite AC-US3-03 being descoped
findings.description: FR-003 in spec.md still says 'Change the post-scaffold condition from !hasGit && !hasRepos to !hasRepos' but AC-US3-03 was descoped. The code correctly keeps the original !hasGit && !hasRepos condition. The discrepancy is between FR-003 (which was not descoped in the FR section) and AC-US3-03 (which was descoped). This is a spec document inconsistency, not a code issue.
findings.suggestedFix: Add a descoped note to FR-003 in spec.md to match AC-US3-03.
findings.impact: No runtime impact. Spec document inconsistency only.
